startPoint.en: Speak to Darren Lightfinger in his cellar, accessed through a trapdoor next to a small house just north of the Lumbridge furnace. (via )
startPoint.es: Habla con Darren Lightfinger en su sótano, al que se accede por una trampilla junto a una casita justo al norte del horno de Lumbridge. (via )

items.name: Logs
items.display: Logs (can be acquired during the quest)

rewards.display: 3 Thieves' guild pamphlets (each granting 175 experience, for a total of 525 experience)

rewards.name: Thieves' Guild I
rewards.display: Thieves' Guild I - At the Thieves' Guild.

text.en: Talk to Guildmaster Darren Lightfinger in the Thieves' Guild north of the house with a furnace in Lumbridge (enter the trapdoor). (opciones de chat: 2 What are you doing down here? (Skip speech.) • 2 And what is it you need done? (Skip speech) • Accept • 2 No, I think I've got the hang of this. • 1 Yes.)
text.es: Habla con el Guildmaster Darren Lightfinger en el Thieves' Guild al norte de la casa con un horno en Lumbridge (entra por la trampilla). (opciones de chat: 2 What are you doing down here? (Skip speech.) • 2 And what is it you need done? (Skip speech) • Accept • 2 No, I think I've got the hang of this. • 1 Yes.)

text.en: Talk to Chief Thief Robin, south of Lumbridge Castle inside the castle wall. (opciones de chat: 1 Go ahead.)
text.es: Habla con Chief Thief Robin, al sur de Lumbridge Castle dentro de la muralla del castillo. (opciones de chat: 1 Go ahead.)

text.en: Talk to Father Urhney in his house to the south in the Lumbridge Swamp. (opciones de chat: 3 Nice chalice. • 3 Can I have a look at it?)
text.es: Habla con Father Urhney en su casa al sur, en Lumbridge Swamp. (opciones de chat: 3 Nice chalice. • 3 Can I have a look at it?)

text.en: If The Restless Ghost has been completed, (opciones de chat: 4 Nice chalice. • 3 Can I have a look at it?)
text.es: Si se ha completado The Restless Ghost, (opciones de chat: 4 Nice chalice. • 3 Can I have a look at it?)

text.en: Light a fire outside one of Urhney's windows.
text.es: Enciende una hoguera junto a una de las ventanas de Urhney.

text.en: Talk to Urhney and mention the chalice then the fire. (opciones de chat: 3 Nice chalice. • 4 Fire! Fire!)
text.es: Habla con Urhney y menciona el cáliz y luego el fuego. (opciones de chat: 3 Nice chalice. • 4 Fire! Fire!)

text.en: If The Restless Ghost has been completed, (opciones de chat: 4 Nice chalice. • 4 Fire! Fire!)
text.es: Si se ha completado The Restless Ghost, (opciones de chat: 4 Nice chalice. • 4 Fire! Fire!)

text.en: Pickpocket Urhney quickly to get a complex key.
text.es: Roba a Urhney rápidamente para conseguir una llave compleja.
